prompt:
Goal: Create a dreamy Japanese bedtime charm poster featuring a sheep-themed girl and gentle good-luck message.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 illustration, soft parchment-cream background with watercolor texture, delicate gold celestial arcs, tiny stars, sparkles, and faint botanical flourishes around the edges.

Layout: Place one young girl on the left third, cropped from about knees upward, reaching her right hand forward toward the viewer in a friendly pointing gesture. The right two-thirds are reserved for elegant Japanese typography centered vertically, with decorative gold divider lines and small ornaments. Keep the composition airy, warm, and bedtime-themed.

Subject details: The girl wears a fluffy white sheep-ear hood over wavy light brown hair, a pale sage-green long-sleeve dress with small white daisy pattern and gathered waist, and carries a woven wicker basket in her left hand. The basket has exactly 1 sheep-face plush charm attached to the front. Her face is intentionally obscured by a plain flat beige square mask with no facial features. Behind her on the far left is exactly 1 large golden crescent moon. Add white daisies and soft foliage near the lower left and lower right corners.

Text content: Use Japanese text exactly as follows. Large headline on the upper right: 「ひつじのおまじない」 followed by exactly 1 pink faceted heart icon. Below it, two centered lines: 「今日ラッキーだった事を」 and 「ひとつ思い出してから寝よう」 with 「ラッキー」 highlighted in soft pink while the rest is warm brown. Under the message place exactly 1 tiny gold sheep icon between short decorative horizontal lines and sparkles.

Visual style: Soft watercolor and gouache storybook illustration, warm beige and muted sage palette, gold ink accents, delicate magical bedtime atmosphere, elegant hand-drawn Japanese calligraphy, subtle grain, gentle lighting, no harsh outlines.

Constraints: Include exactly these countable main elements: 1 girl, 1 sheep-ear hood, 1 sage daisy dress, 1 wicker basket, 1 sheep plush charm, 1 crescent moon, 1 pink heart icon, 1 tiny gold sheep icon, 2 main message lines, and 1 headline. Do not add extra characters, animals, logos, watermarks, or additional large text.
